---
name: Chore
about: For cleanup, refactoring, dependency upgrades, and other non-functional maintenance
  tasks.
title: "[CHORE] "
labels: chore
assignees: ''

---

### Description

Describe the maintenance or cleanup task. This includes things like:

- Refactoring
- Dependency updates
- Removing unused code/files
- Updating build scripts or CI/CD

### Task Checklist

- [ ] This task does not change application behavior
- [ ] The task has no user-facing impact
- [ ] The task is clearly scoped

### Additional Context

(Optional) Links to related PRs, issues, or documentation.
